subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face toward the Kingdom of Sanctity! Thy letter was received and its contents noted. In truth, during these years [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توجه الی ملکوت التقدیس مکتوب مرسول مضمونش معلوم فی الحقیقه در این سنوات
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
